title: Adversarial-verify verdict
description: Produced by a skeptic agent trying to REFUTE a finding against the code + screenshots before it reaches the report. Default to refuted when uncertain.

isReal.description: True only if the finding survives a genuine attempt to refute it.

rationale.description: Why it holds or fails. Be specific.

evidence.description: The grounding checked: file:line and/or screenshot filename.

isMockArtifact.description: True if the observation is a dev-fixture/automation artifact, not real product behavior.

severityAdjustment.description: Whether the verifier thinks severity should change.
